title: cheiranthus × fruticulosus
intro: Cheiranthus × fruticulosus, also known as the fragrant rockcress or winter savory rockcress, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help in treating various health issues. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and acting as an expectorant to ease respiratory problems. Cheiranthus × fruticulosus can be consumed as a tea or added to herbal preparations, such as infusions and decoctions, to harness its medicinal properties.
